## Tags
discount, offer, sale, voucher, tag, monetization, marketing, finance, financial, exchange, transaction, payment, cents, dollar, usd, $, ¢

## Categories
shopping, finance

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/badge-cent)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::BadgeCent;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        BadgeCent { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
